caption: A man wearing a grey, pointed wig, glasses, a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders sits in a podcast studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and various pieces of clothing on hangers. A logo on the left reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and a similar logo on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man is seen talking and gesturing with his right hand, which briefly enters the frame. He then shifts his gaze downward and remains relatively still. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, highlighting the man's eccentric attire and the professional recording equipment.
